eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Clay, MN; Cass, ND; at 11:04 PM on JAN 15, 2019 Effective until 12:04 AM JAN 16, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test. This is only a test. Red River Regional Dispatch Center.
